supervisor.reason: The daemonize lifecycle adjustment is implemented and validated: prompt runs now emit an in-progress result report before phase completion, finalize that report at the end, and remove the source prompt file after the run finishes.

bootstrap.goal: Add a daemonize mode that watches prompt files from JSON configuration and executes dormammu loops in sorted queue order.

tasks.resume_checkpoint: Resume after the daemonize lifecycle adjustment and focused validation. The next step is optional commit preparation or follow-up hardening around retry policy for prompts that already have a finalized result report.

items.text: Phase 1. Confirm the current `daemonize` prompt and result artifact lifecycle, including when prompt files are read, when result files are written, and how the active `.dev` state should resume

Phase 2. Define the revised `daemonize` lifecycle so prompt files are consumed from `prompt_path`, result files are written to `result_path` before processing completes, and successful runs remove the source prompt
Phase 3. Implement the runner changes for eager in-progress result emission and successful prompt-file cleanup without regressing failure reporting
Phase 4. Add or update unit and integration coverage for the revised prompt consumption and result writing semantics
Phase 5. Update operator-facing docs and `.dev` workflow state, then run focused validation for the active daemonize slice

next_action: Prepare a commit for the daemonize lifecycle adjustment, or harden retry behavior for prompts that already have a finalized result report.
notes: Treat this file as machine truth and keep Markdown synchronized.
DASHBOARD.md should show the actual progress of the active scope.
PLAN.md should list prompt-derived development items in `[ ] Phase N. <title>` format.
The installed guidance bundle and packaged asset copy should stay synchronized.
Legacy TASKS.md snapshots should be migrated forward into PLAN.md without losing checklist state.
A new prompt-driven scope now targets daemonized prompt watching from JSON configuration.
The repository does not currently contain .dev/PROJECT.md or .dev/ROADMAP.md, so planning is grounded in the direct request, AGENTS.md, current code, and machine state.
Daemon mode needs inotify-first monitoring with a 60-second polling fallback where inode-backed watching is unavailable.
The feature request requires separating dormammu workflow skills from per-phase external agent CLI command configuration.
The daemonize design is captured in docs/daemonize-design.md and has been implemented in the new backend/dormammu/daemon package.
A follow-up request changed daemon prompt/result lifecycle semantics after the initial implementation was validated.
Focused validation passed through python3 -m unittest tests.test_daemon.
